title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations specialist

summary.lv: Pindstrup Latvia, daļa no starptautiska Pindstrup koncerna un viena no vadošajām augstas kvalitātes substrātu ražotājām pasaulē (klienti 60+ valstīs), meklē Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations speciālistu Baloži birojam (Ķekavas novads).
summary.en: Pindstrup Latvia — part of the Pindstrup Group, one of the world's leading manufacturers of high-quality substrates serving customers in 60+ countries — is hiring a Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations specialist for its Baloži office (Ķekava municipality).
